Proposed areas

Reference layers

What is this?
Each cluster is the concave hull of a group of Freeglers who actually live near each other, found by HDBSCAN density clustering. Boundaries are data-driven, not administrative. Names come from the nearest OpenStreetMap place — imperfect, editable, and only a label. Click any cluster for details.
